treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Exploratory laparotomy, lysis of adhesions, and biopsy of mesenteric mass performed along with distal pancreatectomy and splenectomy
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient did well in the post operative period and was cleared to return home

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented for evaluation of chronic pancreatitis
Patient underwent two ERCP procedures to attempt to retrieve obstructing pancreatic calculi
Surgery for distal pancreatectomy and splenectomy performed
Patient discharged home with post-operative instructions

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with surgeon and Primary Care Provider (PCP) as advised
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive.
